positive: A stylized celestial botanical illustration featuring intertwining bioluminescent vines, abstract geometric mandalas, and glowing fauna silhouettes (like stylized hummingbirds or butterflies). The scene is set against a deep midnight indigo and cerulean gradient background, giving a cosmic feel. Use strong, clean line work, high contrast, and a limited color palette of glowing teal, deep violet, and electric gold. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, creating a cohesive, repeating pattern ideal for apparel print. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with modern abstract geometric art. Studio quality, vector illustration, maximalist pattern design, high resolution, minimal shading, flat design elements.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur drawing, photorealistic, gradients, gradient shading
